guide_wp_step1_desc: Search \"e-claw\" on Google Play and install EClawbot.
guide_wp_step2_desc: Open the App, log in with Device ID, select the Bot Entity for wallpaper.
guide_wp_step3_desc: Long-press home → Wallpaper → Live Wallpaper → EClawbot → Apply.
guide_wp_step4_desc: Your home screen shows the Bot\'s chat interface. New messages appear automatically.
guide_wp_tip_li1: ✅ Set up proactive pushes: Bot must send messages actively for wallpaper to feel live
guide_wp_tip_li2: ✅ Pair with TTS voice: Wallpaper display + voice readout = double notification
guide_wp_tip_li3: ✅ Lightweight Soul: Wallpaper replies should be short and punchy
guide_wp_tip_li4: ⚠️ Watch battery: Live wallpaper runs continuously — enable battery saver
guide_gps_scenario1_desc: User asks \"anything good to eat nearby?\" — Bot gets GPS, returns restaurants sorted by distance with ratings, price range, and hours for instant decision-making.
guide_gps_scenario2_desc: Can't find parking? Bot queries nearby lots, shows distance, rates, and available spaces (requires parking API integration) — a lifesaver for drivers.
guide_gps_scenario3_desc: Meeting up? Bot requests GPS from multiple users, calculates a meeting point, and provides navigation links — solving the \"where are you? I'm here!\" chaos in one click.
guide_gps_setup_step1: # Step 1: Configure Bot Identity with location-aware service role
guide_gps_setup_step2: # Step 2: Bot calls POST /api/device/location/request in conversation
